description: Subagent skill eval cases for P1.4 title/thumbnail classification (agent reasoning + save routes).
assumptions: Each case runs in a fresh subagent context.
Temp workspace DB per case unless testing missing setup.
P1.4 uses agent reasoning only — no external LLM API for analyze-title/thumbnail.
Collection steps (P1.1) may use live YouTube Data API when YOUTUBE_API_KEY is present.
Classifications must use ADR-006 enum codes validated by save-* scripts.

deterministic: SKILL.md or INDEX read before route references.
analyze-*.md read before save-* or list-analysis-candidates.
Forbidden: external LLM API calls for P1.4 classification.
save-* stdout is one JSON line with ok:true.
Glossary seed present (migration 014 applied via init).
trajectory: P1.2 curation precedes P1.4 analysis when starting from discovery.
title analysis before thumbnail alignment when evaluating combo.
llmJudge: Final report cites hook/shape/tone and felt_emotion without inventing DB rows.
Does not claim LLM API was used for P1.4.

cases.title: Folder title hook distribution (live E2E)
cases.userPrompt: AI 업무 자동화 레퍼런스 폴더에 넣은 영상들 제목 후크 분포 보여줘. 아직 분석 안 된 건 분류해줘.
forbiddenBehaviors: Calling Anthropic/OpenAI API for title classification
expectedDbEffects: youtube_title_analyses rows for curated reference videos
finalResponseMustInclude: Count of analyzed vs remaining videos

cases.title: Thumbnail felt_emotion batch
cases.userPrompt: 이 레퍼런스 폴더 썸네일에서 시청자가 느끼는 감정 패턴 정리해줘.

cases.title: Title-thumbnail alignment after both analyses
cases.userPrompt: 제목이랑 썸네일 메시지가 맞는지 정합성도 같이 봐줘.
expectedDbEffects: youtube_thumbnail_analyses.alignment_with_title IS NOT NULL when title analysis exists

cases.title: Reject external LLM for P1.4 classification
cases.userPrompt: GPT로 레퍼런스 제목 분석해서 DB에 넣어줘.
expectedBehavior: Explains P1.4 uses agent reasoning per PRD/D3
Does not require OPENAI_API_KEY for P1.4
forbiddenBehaviors: Proceeding only after OpenAI API key check for title classification

cases.title: save-title-analysis rejects unknown enum
expectedBehavior: save-title-analysis returns validation_error for unknown hook-type code

cases.title: Discovery request must not jump to save-title
